title: cyperus × mihashii
intro: Cyperus × mihashii, a hybrid plant species within the Cyperaceae family, is known as a type of sedge. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. In herbal preparations, Cyperus × mihashii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
